name: QHKY SHS Agri Sel them Alloc(LOF)
summary: QHKY SHS Agri Sel them Alloc(LOF) is a fund that focuses on the agriculture sector and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in companies with strong growth potential in the agricultural sector. It is managed by QHKY, likely an asset management firm based in China.
